# AI Outsource Hub

AI Outsource Hub (AOH) is a service business that runs AI tools for local small businesses.
Clients outsource the operation of AI to AOH — they never have to learn the tools themselves.

## What we do

### Reviews
Automated review request campaigns sent via SMS and email to customers after service.
AI-drafted replies in the business owner's voice — included with the standard plan, not the 30-day intro.
Google Business Profile audit and fix during the 30-day intro; deeper optimization at standard plan.
Starting at $1/day for first 30 days, then $99/month + $99 setup at renewal.

### AI Visibility
Gets local businesses recommended by name when customers ask ChatGPT, Google AI, or Perplexity
for a recommendation. Includes structured data implementation, AI search presence audit, and
ongoing optimization. Starting at $3/day, no contract.

### Relay — AI Voice Agent
Multilingual AI receptionist that answers calls, books appointments, and handles customer
inquiries 24/7 in 27+ languages. Fully managed — AOH handles setup, training, and operation.

### Studio — AI Content
Done-for-you AI content production — social media posts, images, carousels, and campaigns,
created and published in the business owner's brand voice.

### Custom AI Agents
Custom-built AI agents for business owners. Example: Business Owner Briefing — a daily AI
digest of business performance, leads, and alerts delivered automatically each morning.

## Who we serve
Local and small service businesses where reputation directly drives new customers.
Typically: businesses where customers check reviews before choosing, service providers who
book appointments, businesses with repeat customers, and owner-operated businesses without
a dedicated marketing team.

Examples include pet groomers, veterinary practices, auto repair shops, moving companies,
funeral homes, senior living facilities, marketing consultants, and B2B service businesses.

## Contact
Website: https://aioutsourcehub.com
Email: support@aioutsourcehub.com
